exercises.prompt: Do dimensions match? (1) v = d/t  (2) KE = ВЅmv  (3) W = Fd. Write the dimensions for each side.
exercises.solution: (1) v = d/t: [LTвЃ»В№] = [L]/[T]вњ“ (2) KE = ВЅmv: [MLВІTвЃ»ВІ] в‰  [M][LTвЃ»В№] вњ— (should be vВІ) (3) W = Fd: [MLВІTвЃ»ВІ] = [MLTвЃ»ВІ][L]вњ“. Dimensions must match on both sides!

exercises.prompt: Which of these is WRONG just by looking at dimensions? (1) d = vt  (2) a = vt  (3) vВІ = 2ad. Show why.
exercises.solution: (1) v = d/t: [LTвЃ»В№] = [L]/[T]вњ“ (2) KE = ВЅmv: [MLВІTвЃ»ВІ] в‰  [M][LTвЃ»В№] вњ— (should be vВІ) (3) W = Fd: [MLВІTвЃ»ВІ] = [MLTвЃ»ВІ][L]вњ“. Dimensions must match on both sides!
hints: Check if both sides have the same dimensions
If they don't match, it's wrong
